details.IncidentDetail: "[13] RP ADV AFTER TC HE DROVE VEH OFF FWY / THEN HAD HIS GIRLFRIEND MEET HIM OFF FWY / FOLLOWED RP TO SADDLEBACK AUTOMOTIVE / THEN WENT TO HOSP"
"[10] 86-552 REQ 1021 RP / ASC ADDRESS TO SADDLEBACK AUTOMOTIVE WHERE VEH IS LOCATED / REQ RP TO 98 AT LOCATION"
"[8] VV HIT CD, EXITD FWY AND WAS TOWED"
"[3] BLU MACLAREN AND LIGHT COLORD CHEV CAMARO 23109 UNK PLTS 130 MPH UNK WHICH VEH POSS HIT VV VV CONCUSSION 97 98 FM DR VV TOWED TO SADDLEBACK AUTOMOTIVE "
"[1] TUESDAY--MARCH 31ST 2026 --- ORANGE COUNTY CHP MEDIA LOG ^"
"[4] PER STAA'S RP: THERE IS A HOLE IN THE MIDDLE OF THE BRIDGE AND THE MALE IS SITTING IN THAT HOLE IN THE MIDDLE OF THE BRIDGE WHICH IS OVER THE FWY."
"[4] SV HIT THE VV AND CONTINUED ON "
"[4] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 EXPEDITE TOW 619-255-7179 // CPYS OOG AND CD"
"[3] BOTH VEHS PULLED TO THE RHS "
"[2] SIL VOLK JET VS WHI LEX "
"[6] SV - LEFT AFTER TC / MULTI WITNESSES ARE ON SCENE"
"[2] 2 VEHS HAVE STOPPED TO TRYING AND WAKE HIM UP / VEH IS RUNNING / STOPPED / MALE SUBJECT ASLEEP"
"[13] 23B WILL HANDLE THE VEH IN CD [Shared]"
"[1] BLK PK VS CD GUARDRAIL / ALL IN CD"

Log.Location: "Dos Picos Park Rd / Mussey Grade Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[20] 108-096 VEH PARKED AND LOCKED / FAMILY TO PICK UP"
"[3] PER RP SV HIT AND RAN OVER RP'S NEIGHBORS MAILBOX "
"[2] RP HAS THE VEH AND THE DRIVER ,, ALSO HAS VEH KEYS IN HIS POSSESSION"
"[38] A92-003 CONTACT N COMM FOR 1021 THAT I AM ABLE TO CONTACT LATER WILL BE EXTENDED TO ORIG SCENE / POSS 3 SEPERATE TC LCOATIONS"
"[19] WITNESS TO STAM HAS THE KEYS TO THE VEH AND EYES ON THE SUBJ [Shared]"
"[18] WITNESS ADVISING SUSPECT GOT OO THE VEH AND WALKED INTO THE 76 GAS STATION [Shared]"
"[17] [Notification] [CHP]-STAM HAS WITNESS THAT FOLLWED SUSPECT VEH TO POSTAL AT CIVIC CENTER [Shared]"
"[16] PER N COMM VEH GOA ON ARRIVAL [Shared]"
"[7] [Notification] [CHP]-NORTH COMM REQ CHP MONTE VISTA X LOMA VISTA / VEH VS FIRE HYDRANT / NO SV INFO"
"[9] [Appended, 13:48:01] [1] VEH VS FIRE HYDRANT / WATER SHOOTING 25 FEET IN AIR"
"[2] WIT NOW NEAR THE FIRE STATION"
"[10] Secondary Location for A92-023: PNR DEER SPRINGS, 26915 MESA ROCK RD,Unincorporated, CA 92026."
"[3] VEH VS RP'S PARKED VEH / DMG'D RP'S SIDEVIEW MIRROR"
"[3] 108-062 RTH TO CD FOR CT PICK UP "
"[2] "FIRE ON THE SIDE OF THE MOUNTAINT" PER RP VISIBLE FM NB 15 @ RAILROAD CYN"
"[5] CT ADVSD HIGH WIND ADVISORY ONLY WILL KEEP ASSESSING WIND "
"[2] REDROCK RANDSBURG RD - CLOSED FROM SR14 TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE "
"[1] GARLOCK RD - CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 ***RESIDENTIAL ACCESS PERMITTED***"
"[8] RP NOW REQ CHP FOR 1110 FOR INSURANCE - RP AT HIS R 2310 PEDRAS RD // CPS TO KEEP PHONE NEAR BY IN CASE CHP RECALLS"
"[6] NEG INJS - BOTH PTYS EXCH INFO AND WENT ON THEIR WAY "
"[4] RP'S WORK VEH WHI DODGE RAM 1500 VS SMALL DIRT BIKE "
"[8] RP WILL 1023 ON RS - WB 60 JWO 15"

details.IncidentDetail: "[5] PTYS OO VEHS EXCHANGING INFO IN LNS "
